name: @shrey-junior/sj-core
description: Platform-neutral repo-first control plane engine for Kiwi Control

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');fs.rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true});fs.rmSync('tsconfig.tsbuildinfo',{force:true});" && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node ../../scripts/copy-runtime-assets.mjs packages/sj-core/dist/runtime && node ../../scripts/remove-macos-metadata.mjs dist
